FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fb3d9c627a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-28T17:19:30Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-28T17:17:45Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-28T17:19:30Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-28T17:17:45Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/28 17:21:14.436431540 }

2026/05/28 17:21:11.968575179 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968591500 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968651672 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968653375 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968678322 {
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968679303 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968693379 new <- list()
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968694472 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968709229 new$width <- width
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968709950 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968725800 new$height <- height
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968726572 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968742030 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968742802 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968759152 new$title <- title
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968759924 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968775172 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968775973 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968791723 new$version <- version
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968792584 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968808414 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968809286 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968824965 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968825757 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968841666 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968842528 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968856955 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968857826 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968873115 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968880639 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968898682 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968899574 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968918409 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968919481 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968937505 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968938356 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968964015 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968964906 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968983050 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968983901 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.968999501 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969000302 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969015871 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969016653 if (!missing(producer))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969033324 new$producer <- producer
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969034095 if (!missing(author))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969050596 new$author <- author
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969051387 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969072126 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969073839 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969094247 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969095019 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969108915 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969126728 "default"))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969127630 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969170760 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969171972 }
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969184155 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969184936 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969201357 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969202119 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969222797 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969223579 }
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969236673 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969237445 }
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969249547 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969250359 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969260908 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969271107 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969271869 domain = NA)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969286706 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969287498 }
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969299991 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969300733 old$family <- family
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969315400 }
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969316192 version <- old$version
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969328154 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969328935 "2.0")
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969341729 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969342591 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969358070 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969358891 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969372817 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969373579 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969393589 domain = NA)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969396325 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969422313 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969423495 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969442701 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969443473 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969462348 old$author)
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969463169 invisible()
2026/05/28 17:21:11.969474300 }
